title: Etelo
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Etelo''' were herd animals native to the planet [[Togoria/Legends|Togoria]]. Their native habitat was the plains, where they were hunted by the primitive [[Togorian/Legends|Togorians]]. The nomadic male Togorians continued their primitive lifestyle, hunting wild herds even as the settled female Togorians established domesticated herds near their towns and cities.<ref name="Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races">''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Star Wars Missions 8: Togorian Trap]]''
